note.summary: Zero trades executed: 2447 candidates created but only 2 reached execution gate (both rejected for underdog_price_below_floor). System is in pure observation mode with no evidence of edge. TradingView signals show 43.9% directional hit rate (worse than random) and RSI trend predictions at 39% accuracy.

knob_recommendations.reason: Lower from presumed 0.50 to allow 2 blocked candidates through for evidence collection
Raise bar: TradingView signals hit 43.9% vs 50% baseline, showing negative edge
Require 100 settled outcomes before any live consideration given zero current evidence

new_lessons.rule: TradingView composite signals predict 5-min direction at 43.9% (n=196) vs 50% random, constituting negative alpha
RSI trend state predictions achieve 39% accuracy (n=154), significantly worse than chance; consider inverting or discarding
Only 2/2447 candidates (0.08%) reach execution; underdog_price_below_floor blocks 100% of gate arrivals, preventing evidence collection
584 rejected at directional stage vs 2 at execution; directional quality is bottleneck, not execution constraints
With 0 settled trades, all context bucketing (hurst, zscore, markov, etc) lacks empirical basis; avoid trading until nâ¥50

lessons.rule: No execution gate decisions = no edge signal; must first enable candidate flow to accumulate settled trades before any context filtering
Multiple restrict-only gates (down_bias, context, signal) configured but no base trading activity; gates can only obscure edge discovery when zero trades flow
All features missing (hurst, half_life, zscore, kalman) on 5/12 candidates; insufficient lookback or data pipeline issue blocks feature engineering before edge assessment
Pipelines that reject 100% of candidates before fills generate zero edge evidence; loosen gates to accumulate â¥100 settled samples
All execution_gate rejects were underdog_price_below_floor; if tightening up_underdog_entry_max does not yield fills, the edge model is miscalibrated
87 skips via directional_series_not_allowed with down_bias_gate enabled suggests combinatorial over-blocking; audit block_up_* rules for redundancy
64/90 missing_data events were hurst:insufficient_returns; if Hurst is mission-critical, increase lookback or soften hurst_regime gates
No fills = no edge evidence. All gate logic is speculative until settled trades exist.
Both gate candidates rejected for underdog_price_below_floor; current floor may be too strict or market never offers edge
With 0% exploration in down_bias_gate and context_gate, blocked contexts never sample. Enable 5% to validate priors.
168 skipped for 'directional_series_not_allowed'; clarify if this is intentional or config error
0 accepted trades = 0 evidence of edge; all avoid/exploit claims are priors, not data
248/498 skipped for directional_series_not_allowed suggests misconfigured feature pipeline or data availability gap
100% of execution_gate candidates (2/2) hit underdog_price_below_floor; no fills = no calibration possible
down_bias_gate blocks 20+ UP conditions but 0 passed/blocked/explored â gate never invoked; upstream filters dominate
Only 2/498 missing_data (no_open_snapshot); feature gaps (hurst, zscore, kalman) are non-critical
0 accepted â 0 settled â no win_rate/calibration/PnL â no validated edge; all filters are priors, not evidence
100% execution gate rejects = underdog_price_below_floor; raise up_underdog_entry_max OR disable to collect data
94% (623/661) rejected before gate (directional 291, cohort 36, skipped 330); loosen upstream to reach execution
exploration_rate=0 + restrict-only gates â eternal zero samples; minimal exploration (5%) needed to bootstrap learning
0 alerts received/valid â all MTF/signal learning diagnostics empty; verify webhook live + symbol whitelist
hurst 64, half_life 19, zscore 19, kalman 7 missing â ensure sufficient lookback windows for feature computation
all readiness gates fail due to 0 accepted; gates designed for 100-500+ sample thresholds irrelevant at this stage
0 fills = 0 evidence of edge; all contexts are avoid until >=30 settled samples per bucket show >60% win rate
15 TradingView alerts received, 0 translated to fills; signal->outcome link is untested, treat as decorrelated noise
100% execution gate rejects = underdog_price_below_floor; if floor is calibrated, respect it; if arbitrary, lower 0.02-0.05 to gather data
409 directional rejects + 411 series skips = near-total suppression; loosen one filter to generate any training sample

RSI trend observer shows 66.7% next-window prediction accuracy (15 samples) but 38.7% signal direction hit rate (31 samples); asymmetry suggests RSI state may predict reversals not continuations; monitor if prediction accuracy holds at N>30

underdog_price_below_floor rejected 100% of execution gate candidates (2/2); current floor eliminates all borderline-EV opportunities; calibrate floor via observed fill quality if relaxed
0 accepted trades = 0 statistical evidence of edge; all recommendations are pre-data hypotheses only
RSI trend signal hit rate 44% (<50%); current TradingView integration shows no predictive value
underdog_price_below_floor rejected 100% of gate candidates; floor may be too conservative to gather evidence
526/571 feature-scored candidates rejected at directional stage (92%); tighten only after proving base model works
TradingView RSI alerts show 48.6% hit rate (n=70 UP) and 42.6% prediction accuracy (n=54)âboth sub-random; do not weight these signals
underdog_price_below_floor is sole execution reject (2/2); current floor likely >0.50; lower to 0.45-0.48 to collect initial samples
584/1310 candidates skipped for 'directional_series_not_allowed'; re-enable or log which series blocked to diagnose missing opportunities
0 settled trades = zero calibration/edge evidence; priority is data collection, not optimizationârelax gates to achieve nâ¥100 samples
TradingView signal hit rate 42.5% < 50% baseline; do not trade on current signal config until hit rate â¥55% over nâ¥100
RSI down_streak3 shows p_up=0.9 (n=10) but sample too small; require nâ¥30 per state before acting on learned probabilities
100% of gate rejects were underdog_price_below_floor; if preventing all trades, lower floor incrementally (0.48â0.46) to gather execution data
0 settled trades = 0 evidence of edge; prioritize data collection over profitability until n_settledâ¥50 to measure true win rate
TradingView 3min signals at 40.4% hit rate show no edge over random (50%); do not increase weight without 55%+ evidence

100% execution gate reject = underdog_price_below_floor means floor is miscalibrated; lower incrementally and measure realized edge distribution
584/1636 directional rejects with zero accepted trades indicates gate is eliminating variance needed to learn; gather 100+ accepted samples before tightening
TradingView signal direction hit rate 46.3% < 50% baselineâsignals predict 5-min outcome worse than random; do NOT use raw signal direction as alpha
RSI trend state prediction accuracy 39.3%âlearned states have no forward predictive power; abandon RSI trend as feature until accuracy > 55% over 200+ samples
underdog_price_below_floor rejected 100% of gate candidates (2/2); if this persists over 50+ gate attempts, the floor is miscalibrated or market is structurally unfavorable
0 settled trades = 0 calibration data; cannot assess Brier, log_loss, or real edgeâpriority is generating ANY accepted flow, even at reduced confidence tiers

underdog_price_below_floor rejected 100% (2/2) of execution_gate candidates; current floor may be miscalibrated or market prices compress near 0.5 in 5-min BTC
RSI trend signal hit_rate=45.8% (n=142) and forward prediction accuracy=40% (n=105) both underperform 50% random baseline; do not use RSI trend as directional input

If underdog_price_below_floor rejects 100% of gate candidates for >1000 raw candidates, lower floor by 0.03â0.05 to collect marginal-edge samples

If accepted=0 for >2000 candidates while report_only=true, execution gate is too conservative for learning; relax one constraint (floor, spread_max, or depth_min) by 10%
TradingView RSI trend signals show 36% prediction accuracy and 48% direction hit rate on BTC 5-minâno better than random. Do not assume directional value.
100% of execution attempts rejected by underdog_price_below_floor (2/2). Current floor (likely 0.50) may be too conservative; need data at 0.45â0.48 to assess true edge boundary.
With 0 accepted trades from 2,284 candidates, there is zero empirical evidence of exploitable edge. All recommendations are speculative until sample size â¥100 accepted.
